evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Supporting data quality, governance and compliance requirements within BI solutions... Applying good practice in Power BI performance, usability, security and access control
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD is dominated by governance, compliance, data quality, and "single version of the truth" language throughout, with no speed/shipping framing, so rigour dominates.
evidence.domain_risk: Southern Water is building a modern, trusted data platform to support better decision-making, regulatory performance and customer outcomes.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Southern Water is a regulated UK water utility and the JD explicitly names regulatory performance and compliance among the BI function's core purposes, indicating high domain risk.
evidence.collaboration_width: Product Owners; Data Modellers; Data Engineers; Platform teams; BI Engineers
evidence.data_team_maturity: This is an exciting opportunity to join a newly formed BI Engineering team and help shape how business intelligence is delivered, governed and improved across Southern Water.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The BI Engineering team itself is newly formed, but it sits alongside established Data Modeller, Data Engineer, and Platform teams within a larger, already-governed data organisation, indicating a mid-maturity function rather than a from-zero build.
evidence.jd_authorship: You will act as a key link between business stakeholders, Product Owners, Data Modellers, Data Engineers and Platform teams — helping translate business needs into practical, scalable and well-governed BI solutions.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD names specific adjacent roles, squad structure (domain-aligned agile squad), and concrete tools (Power BI, DAX, Power Query, Databricks) reflecting genuine hiring-manager detail about how the team operates.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Southern Water is building a modern, trusted data platform to support better decision-making, regulatory performance and customer outcomes.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves the BI/data platform function and its regulatory/governance mandate itself rather than a single external commercial, product, or finance stakeholder group, an internal_data orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: help lead the day-to-day delivery of BI solutions within a domain-aligned agile squad... Helping establish reusable BI standards, patterns and delivery processes
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role combines hands-on delivery and mentoring/coordination (execution) with helping establish standards and patterns across the BI community (a direction-setting element), landing on mixed.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Join a newly formed BI Engineering team with the opportunity to help shape how it works... Reviewing and improving existing BI assets, models and reporting processes
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The team itself is newly formed, but the candidate reviews and improves existing BI assets and reporting processes rather than building entirely new infrastructure, a mixed greenfield/fix framing.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI/ML tooling or skill is mentioned anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: Supporting data quality, governance and compliance requirements within BI solutions
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality/governance is an explicit, owned responsibility area for the role.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Southern Water is building a modern, trusted data platform to support better decision-making, regulatory performance and customer outcomes.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Regulatory performance and governance/compliance are named in the role summary itself, and recur throughout responsibilities (utility sector, regulated industry).
